MOTION TO COMPEL COMPLIANCE WITH SUBPOENAS (TRANSACTION ID # 100200301) (TRANSACTION ID # 100200301) (TRANSACTION ID # 100200301) FILED BY PETITIONER ANSON ADVISORS INC. HEARING SET FOR JUN-08-2023 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 302
NON-PARTY AND RESPONDENT REDDIT, INC.S RESPONSE TO PETITIONERS OBJECTIONS TO EVIDENCE (TRANSACTION ID # 100202326) FILED BY RESPONDENT REDDIT, INC.
MINI MINUTES FOR JUN-08-2023 09:00 AM FOR DEPT 302

DISCOVERY 302, PETITIONER ANSON ADVISORS INC.'S MOTION TO COMPEL COMPLIANCE WITH SUBPOENAS. THE MOTION IS GRANTED. THE STATEMENTS ABOUT PETITIONERS BY THE ANONYMOUS SPEAKERS ARE DEFAMATORY ON THEIR FACE. THOSE SPEAKERS MAY HAVE VIABLE AFFIRMATIVE DEFENSES, BUT THE BURDEN SHIFTS TO THEM TO PROVE THOSE DEFENSES. TO RAISE THOSE DEFENSES ANONYMOUSLY WITHOUT THE RIGHT OF CROSS EXAMINATION WOULD BE UNFAIR. REDDIT MUST RESPOND TO THE SUBPOENA WITHIN 15 DAYS. THE COURT WILL SIGN THE PROPOSED ORDER EMAILED TO THE JPT. JUDGE PRO TEM: THOMAS COHEN, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED. (302/JPT)

calendar.matters:
MOTION TO COMPEL COMPLIANCE WITH SUBPOENAS
Off Calendar Jun-08-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER ANSON ADVISORS INC.'s MOTION TO COMPEL COMPLIANCE WITH SUBPOENAS.

The Motion is granted. The statements about Petitioners by the Anonymous Speakers are defamatory on their face. Those Speakers may have viable affirmative defenses, but the burden shifts to them to prove those defenses. To raise those defenses anonymously without the right of cross examination would be unfair. Reddit must respond to the subpoena within 15 days.

The Court will sign the proposed order emailed to the JPT.

Judge Pro Tem: Thomas Cohen, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JPT)
